scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter client dev" "pnpm --filter server dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm notify
scripts.notify: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const sounds = ['Hero','Ping','Pop','Tink']; execSync('afplay /System/Library/Sounds/' + sounds[Math.floor(Math.random()*sounds.length)] + '.aiff', { stdio: 'ignore' });"
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter client lint && pnpm --filter server lint
